patch_actions.label: Load asset
patch_actions.description: Replace a target asset with a file from the content pack.

patch_actions.label: Edit data
patch_actions.description: Change data assets using Entries, Fields, MoveEntries, or TextOperations.

patch_actions.label: Edit image
patch_actions.description: Patch image regions with FromFile, FromArea, and ToArea.

patch_actions.label: Edit map
patch_actions.description: Patch map data with a map file or map operations.

patch_actions.label: Include file
patch_actions.description: Include patches from another content file.

game_data_kinds.label: NPC
game_data_kinds.description: Character data entries and related Content Patcher edits.

game_data_kinds.label: Item/Object
game_data_kinds.description: Object, item, and basic item data.

game_data_kinds.label: Dialogue
game_data_kinds.description: Dialogue entries for a character file.

game_data_kinds.label: Schedule
game_data_kinds.description: NPC schedule entries and SVE-style schedule files.

game_data_kinds.label: Animation
game_data_kinds.description: NPC animationDescriptions entries such as lowercase sleep animations.

game_data_kinds.label: Mail
game_data_kinds.description: Mail letters and trigger-action driven mail content.

game_data_kinds.label: Trigger Action
game_data_kinds.description: Reusable trigger actions for mail, dialogue, and events.

game_data_kinds.label: Custom
game_data_kinds.description: Any target not yet represented by a guided form.
